# Devalok

> Devalok is a full-service design and strategy studio headquartered in
> Lucknow, India with US operations in Phoenix, Arizona. We craft brand
> identities, packaging, UI/UX and web experiences, print and event design,
> motion and multimedia, and manage end-to-end production networks for
> thoughtful founders and purpose-driven brands worldwide.

Founded in August 2024, Devalok works across six integrated disciplines
to build complete brand ecosystems — not fragments. The studio operates
on three principles: We Craft The Whole (strategy to manufacturing),
We Do It All In-House (one multidisciplinary team), and We Go Beyond
the Brief (partners, not vendors). The team of ~14 members (called
Lokwasis) serves clients from early-stage startups to legacy brands.

Notable clients include MoveCars.com, Arculis Advisors, Eat Purposefully,
Bondle, Kaizen Waste, Chandler Sister Cities, DIVINI, NEETI, Coffee
Plantation, and Infinity Mind Movies. Work has been featured in Packaging
of the World, World Brand Design Society, and Creative Gaga. The studio
also produced a 9-minute animated explainer for ASU (7.2K+ views).

## Services — Six Disciplines
- [Brand Story & Visual Identity](https://devalok.in/services): Brand strategy & positioning, naming & verbal identity, logo design & visual systems, brand guidelines & standards
- [Packaging Design](https://devalok.in/services): Product packaging architecture, structural package design, label & graphics, sustainable packaging solutions
- [UI/UX and Web Design](https://devalok.in/services): UX research & strategy, user interface design, website design & development, mobile app design, prototyping & testing
- [Print & Event Design](https://devalok.in/services): Editorial & publication design, marketing collateral, event branding & environmental design, exhibition & trade show design
- [Motion & Multimedia](https://devalok.in/services): Brand animation & motion graphics, video production & editing, social media content creation, interactive multimedia experiences
- [Production Network](https://devalok.in/services): Supply chain strategy & setup, manufacturing partner sourcing, quality assurance & control systems, logistics & distribution planning

## Resources
- [Sahayak — Client Handbook](https://dvlk.in/sahayak): Our process, approach, and what working with Devalok looks like
- [Manas — Annual Publication](https://dvlk.in/manasv1): Culture, process, and portfolio stories from the studio
- [Service Capabilities Report](https://devalok.in/capabilities): Detailed breakdown of all six disciplines with case studies

## Products
- [Karm](https://karm.devalok.in): Internal studio operations platform with MCP (Model Context Protocol) integration — 54 tools registered
- [Shilp Sutra](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@devalok/shilp-sutra): Design system on npm
